notes: 1.0.34: listen-only display + plasma routing + abort-all. The app now WRITES to the display only when you act (removed the automatic connect-poke and Form-4 nav that were flooding the panel); settings write on commit (release the slider / leave the field), not continuously while dragging. Plasma Request On/Off now sends A!/B! to the display (its PA11 plasma relay), with the display's own safety-loop gate applied. Abort now stops EVERYTHING: the Opta cycle + the Tip Charger (PLASMA_STOP over Serial2) + the display plasma relay (B!). Firmware: the Opta's abort always commands PLASMA_STOP to the Tip Charger, not only mid-cycle.
